race.description: Anglican Church Grammar School Churchie Handicap
race.comment: VERY GRATEFUL (1) last appeared five weeks ago over 1514m at Yarra Valley when he finished sixth. This is his first run for the Wayne Baker stable. Bright prospects. QUEEN OF SSORTS (5) did well to score at Nanango two runs ago. Decent effort last time out when prominent at the corner before finishing second over 1000m at Taroom, beaten 1.1 lengths. Looks well placed so expect a better run this time. MISS RAPIDE (7) finished third two runs back at Taroom then improved last time out to score by a head over 1050m at Charleville. Likely to be in the finish again. SAY WHEN SUTTY (11) was prominent at the turn and finished third last start over 1000m at Toowoomba, beaten 1.1 lengths. Fitter for that run. Suitably placed so anticipating another strong effort.
